name: UE5 Asset Quality Tagger - Tier 2 Toy Example

nodes.name: File Watcher: New Asset
nodes.notes: TIER 2 CHARACTERISTIC: Event-based trigger - responds to new asset files

nodes.name: Extract Asset Metadata
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Prepare asset data for AI analysis

nodes.name: Branch: Image or 3D Asset
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Route to appropriate AI analysis

nodes.name: Read Image File
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Load image for vision analysis

nodes.name: Call ChatGPT Vision API: Analyze Image
nodes.notes: TIER 2 KEY: Vision AI analyzes asset quality - semantic understanding of visuals

nodes.name: Analyze 3D Asset (Heuristic)
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Rule-based analysis for 3D assets (not images)

nodes.name: Parse Vision Analysis
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Extract structured data from vision AI response

nodes.name: Merge Analysis Results
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Combine analysis from both paths

nodes.name: Write Asset Metadata
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Save AI analysis as metadata for UE5 import

nodes.name: Check if Low Quality
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Conditional routing based on AI assessment

nodes.name: Alert: Low Quality Asset
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Context-aware notification based on AI quality assessment

nodes.name: Log Asset Analysis
nodes.notes: TIER 2: Track AI assessments for quality monitoring

main.node: Call ChatGPT Vision API: Analyze Image
